text:
The CMS-HCC diagnostic classification system begins by classifying all ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes into diagnostic 
groups. A diagnostic group represents a well-specified medical condition or set of conditions. CMS further aggregated 
the diagnostic groupings into Condition Categories (CCs). CCs describe a broader set of similar diseases. Although they 
are not as homogeneous as the diagnostic groupings, diseases within a CC are related clinically and with respect to 
cost. An example is the
